DOORS WILL NOT LOCK FROM DOOR OUTSIDE HANDLE IN OR AFTER  RAIN.. CAR HAS PASSIVE ENTRY/PUSH BUTTON START. HAVE TO USE INSIDE SWITCH OR LOCK FOB.  UNLOCK FEATURE WORKS.  HAVE SEEN OTHERS WITH SAME COMPLAINT.  FOUND THIS OUT AFTER CAR WAS LEFT UNLOCKED FOR OTHERS TO ENTER UNINVITED

narrative.headline: What 2018 Ford Ecosport owners report most
narrative.summary: Engine-related stalling and unexpected shutoff dominate owner complaints for this vehicle, with many reports describing the engine cutting out during normal driving or at stops and failing to restart. A secondary cluster of reports involves strong exhaust odors noticed while the vehicle is stationary. Powertrain and fuel system issues, including no-start events and low oil pressure warnings accompanied by rattling noises, round out the most commonly reported problems.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report the engine stalling unexpectedly at stops or while driving, sometimes repeatedly, with the vehicle failing to restart after shutdown — in some cases linked to the auto stop-start system not functioning as intended. · 2 fire · 8 crash · 3 injured

issues.title: Engine And Engine Cooling
issues.blurb: Owners report noticing an abnormally strong exhaust odor while the vehicle is stationary, prompting contact with dealers. · 2 crash · 2 injured

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle failing to start despite auxiliary power being present, with the engine eventually starting on its own after an extended wait. · 3 crash · 3 injured

issues.title: Fuel/Propulsion System
issues.blurb: Owners report a low engine oil pressure warning appearing on the dashboard while driving, accompanied by the oil and engine warning lamps illuminating and an audible rattling noise from the engine. · 2 crash · 1 injured
